# AGENTS.md (sample)

> This is a **sample** of the file agentmem regenerates from your active
> lessons. The real `AGENTS.md` is gitignored — it's machine-local generated
> output. agentmem rewrites the block between the markers on every `promote`;
> anything outside the markers is yours to edit and is preserved.

Your own house rules go here, above the generated block.

<!-- BEGIN AGENTMEM LESSONS -->
## Learned lessons (managed by agentmem — do not edit between markers)

### Invoke extended thinking for hard reasoning (behavioral, confidence 1.00)

**Rule:** Add `ultrathink` or `think harder` to prompts for nontrivial design, debugging, or tradeoff-reasoning tasks.

**Why:** Hard problems answered without extended thinking often turn into a propose → push back → re-propose loop.

### Prefer the dedicated search tool over shelling out to grep (workflow, confidence 1.00)

**Rule:** Use the agent's dedicated code-search tool when searching for content or symbols. Reserve shell `grep` for piping.

**Why:** Structured search returns file/line context, supports globs natively, and keeps the transcript clean.
<!-- END AGENTMEM LESSONS -->
